Peter Carl Fabergé

4 works in the gallery.

Lapis Lazuli Easter Egg
by Peter Carl Fabergé
Russia, St. Petersburg · c. 1885–90 · gold, enamel, lapis lazuli, pearls, diamonds, rubies

by Peter Carl Fabergé
Russia, St. Petersburg · c. 1885–90 · gold, enamel, lapis lazuli, pearls, diamonds, rubies

by Peter Carl Fabergé
Russia, St. Petersburg · c. 1885–90 · gold, enamel, lapis lazuli, pearls, diamonds, rubies

by Peter Carl Fabergé
